title: Arkangel AI Kickoff - Operational Analytics & Engagement Proposal
summary: Deep-dive kickoff meeting reviewing Arkangel AI's operational analytics and metrics. The company receives 53,400 monthly visitors with a B2B inbound conversion rate of 0.39%, generating 17 bookings and 3 qualified leads per month, with an outbound CAC of $519 per client. Two engagement options totaling approximately $19,000 were proposed, with revenue projections of $1.7-2M in year 1 and $4M in year 2. Key opportunities identified include improving the inbound conversion rate, optimizing networking events, and reactivating the newsletter.

discussion_points.description: Reviewed website traffic of 53,400 monthly visitors and 35,100 active users (30-day). The B2B inbound conversion rate sits at 0.39%, generating 17 bookings and only 3 qualified leads per month. This was identified as the primary growth opportunity.

Analyzed outbound customer acquisition costs: $519 CAC per client, $7 per meeting booked, $17 per qualified meeting, and $98 per proposal sent. No paid advertising is currently used, representing an untapped growth channel.
Two engagement options were proposed totaling approximately $19,000, with models including fixed cost and revenue share. Revenue projections target $1.7-2M in year 1 and $4M in year 2.
Arkangel operates 162 automated workflows on Gumloop, powering their operational processes. Onboarding duration is 5 days.
Networking dinners are planned for Miami, Boston, and NYC starting March. Need to add follow-up forms to improve tracking and conversion from events.
The UGC newsletter performs well when active but has been inconsistent. Reactivation with a consistent cadence was discussed as a priority.

action_items.description: Coordinate with Lucho for in-depth analytics analysis
Improve networking dinners with follow-up forms for attendee tracking
Reactivate newsletter with consistent publishing cadence
Send engagement proposal with 2 financial options (fixed cost and revenue share)
Implement improvements to inbound conversion rate and lead flow

decisions: Two engagement options will be presented to the client (~$19,000 total), one fixed cost and one revenue share model
Networking dinners will launch in Miami, Boston, and NYC starting March 2026
Inbound conversion rate improvement is the top priority for growth
Newsletter will be reactivated with a consistent schedule
No paid advertising will be introduced yet — focus on organic and outbound optimization first
next_steps: Daniel to send formal proposal with 2 financial options for Laura's approval
Implement inbound conversion rate improvements (target: increase from 0.39%)
Optimize networking dinners with structured follow-up forms
Reactivate UGC newsletter with consistent cadence
Laura to coordinate analytics deep-dive with Lucho

diagrams.title: Arkangel AI Operations Architecture
diagrams.mermaid_code:
flowchart LR
    subgraph Traffic["Traffic Sources"]
        WEB["Website\n53,400 visitors/mo"]
        NL["Newsletter / UGC"]
        NET["Networking Events\nMiami / Boston / NYC"]
    end
    subgraph Platform["Arkangel AI Platform"]
        GUM["Gumloop Engine\n162 Workflows"]
        ONB["Onboarding\n5-day process"]
        AN["Analytics Dashboard"]
    end
    subgraph Funnel["Sales Funnel"]
        INB["Inbound Leads"]
        OUT["Outbound Outreach"]
        QUAL["Qualified Leads"]
        PROP["Proposals"]
    end
    WEB --> INB
    NL --> WEB
    NET --> OUT
    INB --> GUM
    OUT --> GUM
    GUM --> QUAL
    QUAL --> PROP
    PROP --> ONB
    GUM --> AN

    style WEB fill:#27AE60,stroke:#1E8449,color:#fff
    style QUAL fill:#F5A623,stroke:#D4891A,color:#fff
